best_bet.reason: Horry County's slightly cooler water temperature in the lower 80s makes for a refreshing swim on a hot afternoon, and the surf conditions are ideal for anyone looking to get in without dealing with rough conditions.

counties.name: Horry County
counties.beaches: Myrtle Beach · North Myrtle Beach · Surfside Beach · Garden City
